zh.Berrynarbor, Devon, Eng: 英國英格蘭戴文貝利納波爾
zh.Berrynarbor, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文貝利納波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Berry於1441年出生在英國戴文貝利納波爾時，他的父親John Berry23歲，母親Elizabeth Filleigh15歲。他於大約1474年與Elizabeth Pollard在英國戴文貝利納波爾結婚。他去世於1493年4月20日在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.Berrynarbor, Devon, Eng: 英国英格兰戴文貝利納波爾
zh-hans.Berrynarbor, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文貝利納波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Berry于1441年出生在英国戴文貝利納波爾时，他的父亲John Berry23岁，母亲Elizabeth Filleigh15岁。他于大约1474年与Elizabeth Pollard在英国戴文貝利納波爾结婚。他去世于1493年4月20日在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Barry
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Bery
meanings: Hungarian (Béry): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Bér, in Baranya, Komárom, Nógrád, Pest, Vas, or Zala counties.

variants.name: Beery
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Béara. See Berry and O'Berry .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Bieri  .

variants.name: Berrie
meanings: (Glasgow): from Middle English or Older Scots (atte) beri ‘(at the) manor house’, see Berry .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Berry was born in 1441, in Berrynarbor, Devon, England, his father, John Berry, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Filleigh, was 15. He married Elizabeth Pollard about 1474, in Berrynarbor, Devon, England. He died on 20 April 1493, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Berry est né en 1441, à Berrynarbor, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Berry, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Filleigh, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Pollard environ 1474, à Berrynarbor, Devon, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1493, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Berry 1441 in Berrynarbor, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Berry 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Filleigh 15. Er hat um 1474 in Berrynarbor, Devon, England Elizabeth Pollard geheiratet. Er starb am 20. April 1493 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Berry è nato il nel 1441 nel Berrynarbor, Devon, England, il suo padre, John Berry, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Filleigh, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Pollard circa 1474, nel Berrynarbor, Devon, England. Morì il 20 aprile 1493, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Berryが1441年にイギリスデボンバーリナルボルで生まれた時，父John Berryは23歳，母Elizabeth Filleighは15歳であった。約1474年にイギリスデボンバーリナルボルでElizabeth Pollardと結婚した。彼は1493年4月20日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Berry(이)가 1441년 영국 데폰 베리나르볼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Berry(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Filleigh(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1474년 영국 데폰 베리나르볼에서 Elizabeth Pollard(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1493년 4월 20일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Berry nasceu em 1441, em Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Berry, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Filleigh, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Pollard aproximadamente 1474, em Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1493, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Berry родился в 1441 г. в местности бирринарбор, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Berry было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Filleigh, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Pollard около 1474 г. в местности бирринарбор, девон, Англия. Он умер 20 апреля 1493 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Berry nació en 1441, en Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Berry, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Filleigh, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Pollard aproximadamente 1474, en Berrynarbor, Devon, Inglaterra. Murió el 20 de abril de 1493, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
